case_title: DOROTHY GREEN et al VS. ERIC XIAO LI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREEN, DOROTHY GLASS, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT LI, ERIC XIAO DOES 1-25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-13-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-15-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-15-2002
